calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing On Cross-Complaint.
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Cross-Complaint Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kelli George, Esq. for Cross-Plaintiff: Glass Properties, LP.
After hearing the considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Cross-Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Cross-Defendant: Inam Choudhary ind., dba Cyber Copy & Design as follows:
Damages $25,000.00
Attorney's Fees and Costs $42,536.19, for a total of $67,536.19
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing On Cross-Complaint.
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Continued To May-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kelli E. George, Esq. appeared for cross-complainant Glass Properties LP.
Zepporah Glass, manager for Glass Properties LP, was placed under oath and examined.
Cross-defendant Inam Choudhary appeared in pro per, but was precluded from participating in today's proceedings as a default was entered against said cross-defendant on February 14, 2008.
Moe cross-defendants were dismissed on February 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continues this matter to Thursday, May 1, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. for submission of a declaration re: attorneys' fees by counsel for cross-complainant Glass Properties LP. Zepporah Glass' appearance is waived at the next calling of the case.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Continued To May-19-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Continued To May-02-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 503

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2008 Continued To Feb-29-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503
